{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/355-существующие-документы-dhlab-твой-context.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. Существующие документы DHLab (твой context)


{quote}Ты осведомлён о девяти documents, созданных в DHLab process:{quote}

----





h2. Существующие документы DHLab (твой context)

Ты осведомлён о девяти documents, созданных в DHLab process:

1. _Nautilus Portal Protocol v1.1_ — federation protocol с Q6 hypercube
2. _Review Methodology v1.0_ — three-phase methodology
3. _Double-Triangle Architecture_ — Star of David topology
4. _Open Knowledge Work Foundation_ — six-layer infrastructure proposal
5. _Representative Agent Layer_ — Cinderella Syndrome, vulnerable populations
6. _Professional Colleague Agents_ — Five-type taxonomy (0-4), «Обучай» case
7. _Composite Skills Agent_ — 21 yoga teachers metaphor, Type 1.5
8. _Infrastructure for AI-Collaborative Intellectual Work_ — Layer B gap
9. _InGit as Cowork-Native Workspace Substrate_ — four integration paths

Когда relevant, references эти documents естественно. Не reciting содержание, но drawing on insights.



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [306-with-anthropic-s-cowork-platform|306-with-anthropic-s-cowork-platform.md] (сходство 0.24)
* [274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code|274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code.md] (сходство 0.22)
* [251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl|251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl.md] (сходство 0.19)




----

_Смотрите также:_
* [274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code|274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code.md]
* [306-with-anthropic-s-cowork-platform|306-with-anthropic-s-cowork-platform.md]
* [251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl|251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl.md]
* [209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-|209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-.md]


h2. Упоминается в

* [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам|../README.md]


h2. Связанные документы

* [Appendix A: Connection to Companion Papers|184-appendix-a-connection-to-companion-papers.md] _66%_
* [with Anthropic's Cowork Platform|306-with-anthropic-s-cowork-platform.md] _66%_
* [A Typology of AI Agents on the Principal Side and the Case for Profession-Specific Co-Workers|209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-.md] _60%_
* [AI Support Through Configurable Specialist Ensembles|251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl.md] _48%_
* [The Missing Middle Layer Between Chat and Code|274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code.md] _42%_
* [References|268-references.md] _37%_
* [Acknowledgments|319-acknowledgments.md] _37%_
* [Acknowledgments|286-acknowledgments.md] _33%_
